article.title: Need Advice: Google vs Uber
article.content:
I have offers from Google L4 and Uber SDE-2. Google is taking time for team matching as I am looking only in Hyderabad. Uber is about to roll the offer, team is finalized and location is Hyderabad.

Uber ctc: ~70LPA
Google ctc: ~80LPA (RSUs are front loaded)

Should I ask Google bangalore location and join Google(there are many opening in Google bangalore) or go ahead with Uber hyderabad? 

Current yoe: 4years

Please comment your views/opinions.

post.content:
If I were in your place, I’d go with Google Bangalore. Even with a ₹10L difference, you can still enjoy a great lifestyle there. Plus, Bangalore offices are more flexible with work-from-home, which saves a ton of energy and commute time.

Also, if the work-life balance is good, you'll have time to explore both life and tech more deeply. With how Google Gemini and their broader tech ecosystem are bouncing back, I feel Google’s stock has a better long-term upside compared to Uber.

I haven’t worked at Uber myself, but I’ve read on Reddit and Blind that Uber India engineers often end up working on less exciting stuff—mostly maintenance. Not 100% sure, so do your research.

Take your time, read about both companies, and choose what aligns with your goals. Neither is a bad option—just different paths, and it all comes down to perspective. 😄
 ( formatted using GPT for better communication)


Share your interview Experience as well
Go with uber hyderabad. Bangalore is becoming worse day by day

You will earn more in Uber over 2-3 years as Google is front loaded.  I have been in both companies now, and have done the math on this. 
WLB: Google >> Uber
Pay: Uber > Google
Work: Uber >> Google (personal opinion) People join from Google to Uber for more interesting work
Culture: Google >> Uber
Growth: Uber >>> Google
Stock growth: Uber > Google (Controversial, but Google has a lot to lose than gain in AI race.)
Could choose G blr\nCould you also share the interview exp?
Both are great offers if its true that you have two in hand. I would prefer Uber than Google as its more stable.
were the feedbacks of your google onsites mostly SH? because usually before HC they have team match. Also, is the offer verbal?
LC stats ?? \n\n(Work is team dependent) Make sure you ask about how the work is going to be and it aligns with your goals.. to make a decision...
btw hack2hire adds a good layer if you\u2019re already doing lc and want company-targeted prep\n
